testcase.name: @p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.1-001: should have Next.js 15.0.3 in package.json
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.1-002: should have TypeScript 5.x in devDependencies
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.1-003: should have required directory structure
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.2-001: should have Prisma 5.22.0 installed
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.2-002: should have NextAuth 4.24.7 installed
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.2-003: should have Zod 3.23.8 installed
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.2-004: should have React Hook Form 7.51.5 installed
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.2-005: should have TanStack Query 5.x installed
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.2-006: should have Lucide React 0.344.0 installed
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.2-007: should have bcryptjs 2.4.3 installed
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.3-001: should have tailwind.config.js file
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.3-002: should have custom brand colors in tailwind.config.js
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.3-003: should have Inter font scale configured in tailwind.config.js
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.3-004: should have spacing system based on 8px grid
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.4-001: should have shadcn/ui Button component
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.4-002: should have shadcn/ui Card component
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.4-003: should have shadcn/ui Dialog component
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.4-004: should have shadcn/ui Form component
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.4-005: should have shadcn/ui Table component
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.4-006: should have shadcn/ui Toast component
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.4-007: should have @/components/ui path alias configured
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.5-001: should have PostCSS configuration
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.5-002: should have Prisma schema file
@p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.5-003: should have TypeScript configuration for testing
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.4-001: should have GitHub Actions workflow file
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.4-002: should have workflow configured for pull requests
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.4-003: should have workflow configured for main branch pushes
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.4-004: should have test job in workflow
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.4-005: should have Vercel project configuration
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.4-006: should have preview deployment configured
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.4-007: should have production deployment environment configured
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.4-008: should have install and build steps in workflow
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.5-001: should have .env.example file
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.5-002: should have DATABASE_URL documented in .env.example
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.5-003: should have NEXTAUTH_SECRET documented in .env.example
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.5-004: should have NEXTAUTH_URL documented in .env.example
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.5-005: should have SSE configuration documented in .env.example
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.5-006: should have all required environment variables documented
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.5-007: should have environment variable validation at startup
@p1 Story 0.5: CI/CD Configuration Validation › E0-5.5-008: should have documentation for environment-specific variables
